Name: Raffle
Author: Habitat Nightclub
Punchline: Run a 50/50 raffle from the venue floor.
Description: Host tool for a 50/50 raffle: target patrons to register them, sell raffle tickets (100,000 gil each, configurable), auto-assign sequential ticket numbers with a live tracking table, grow a boosted pot by 50% of every ticket sold, per-night ticket caps (40 regular / 50 Lifetime VIP), open/close the round, draw a winner from a /random roll, per-night local archives, and a guided (not automated) payout planner. Optional Supabase shared mode for multiple hosts.
